description: A university rocketry team has been experiencing staging failures with their three-stage low-power rocket. Simplify the design in /home/ga/Documents/rockets/three_stage_source.ork to a functional two-stage configuration that includes a nose cone, at least one set of fins, a recovery device with a proper deployment event, and assigned motors. After verifying the design with a flight simulation, save the modified rocket to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/two_stage_simplified.ork and provide a design modification report at /home/ga/Documents/exports/stage_reduction_report.txt documenting the removed stage, configuration summary, predicted performance (apogee and velocity), and stability margin assessment.
